comment: Is it possible to make the tree a little bigger?  It looks like it's a little out of proportion.  Otherwise, I love it
I also would like to make it clear that free delivery is for a limited time, for pre-orders only
A Little Island Magic, Every December... Can we change "December" to "Christmas Season"?
Is it possible to change the tree skirt to something a little nicer, with some kind of design or multiple colors like red, white, green?

can we use the Blizzard Pine image here?  We are showing this tree in another ad and flocked/white trees are a big draw that sell out first.  Flocked/white trees will get attention because they are more rare and sought after.  They should drive people to the site.
This setting would be one of the nicer homes on the island, but we are showing the most promo-priced tree.  can we use the Grand spruce image?

I'm a little concerned about how this is worded.  There will still be plenty of trees available for sale if people don't pre-order.  I understand we want them to order now, but I don't want customers to think that we won't have anything for sale during the season.  Because we definitely will.  I like what you're trying to say about not having a big warehouse and inventory, but can we say it something like supplies limited, once we are sold out that's it
can we change "shop" to "store" or something that doesn't sound like we have a retail location.  Can we change "We'll have trees available all season long" Deluxe models sell out early
